Tailored To Perfection

Our Packages

Silver

Perfect for intimate gatherings and small celebrations

AED 275 – AED 350 / person

  • Up to 50 guests
  • 3-course seated dinner
  • Seasonal menu selections
  • Dedicated event coordinator
  • Standard table settings
Get a Quote
Most Popular

Gold

Our most popular package for weddings and galas

AED 440 – AED 550 / person

  • Up to 150 guests
  • 5-course tasting menu
  • Premium beverage pairings
  • Full floral arrangements
  • Personal chef on-site
  • Gold-trimmed tableware
Get a Quote

Platinum

The ultimate luxury experience for the most discerning hosts

AED 750+ / person

  • Unlimited guest count
  • Fully custom tasting menu
  • Premium beverage & champagne bar
  • Live cooking stations
  • Dedicated service team
  • Complete venue styling
  • Chef Ricky personal appearance
Get a Quote

Ready to Plan Your Event?

Contact our events team to discuss your vision. We'll craft a bespoke experience that exceeds every expectation.

A Luxury Dining Experience

Indulge in an unforgettable culinary journey at Rickys Restaurant. Where timeless elegance meets modern gastronomy, crafted with the finest ingredients and served with passion.
